mapper.sql: a.id, a.task_id, a.object_type, a.object_id, a.route_id, a.section_id, a.unit_id, a.route_code, a.direction, a.start_stake, a.end_stake, a.year, a.standard_code, a.mqi, a.sci, a.pqi, a.bci, a.tci, a.pci, a.rqi, a.rdi, a.pbi, a.pwi, a.sri, a.pssi, a.grade, a.zero_reason, a.assessed_at, ST_AsGeoJSON(u.geom) AS geom_geo_json, a.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM assessment_result a LEFT JOIN road_evaluation_unit u ON a.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND a.unit_id = u.id AND u.deleted = false WHERE ORDER BY a.route_code ASC, a.start_stake ASC NULLS LAST, a.year DESC

SELECT FROM assessment_result a LEFT JOIN road_evaluation_unit u ON a.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND a.unit_id = u.id AND u.deleted = false WHERE a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = false

SELECT FROM assessment_result a LEFT JOIN road_evaluation_unit u ON a.tenant_id = u.tenant_id AND a.unit_id = u.id AND u.deleted = false WHERE AND u.geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.route_code ASC, a.start_stake ASC NULLS LAST

SELECT count(1) AS total_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'EXCELLENT' THEN 1 END) AS excellent_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'GOOD' THEN 1 END) AS good_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'MEDIUM' THEN 1 END) AS medium_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'POOR' THEN 1 END) AS poor_count, count(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'BAD' THEN 1 END) AS bad_count, avg(a.mqi) AS avg_mqi, avg(a.pqi) AS avg_pqi, avg(a.pci) AS avg_pci FROM assessment_result a WHERE
